summary: Completed frontend testing for topbar CTA removal and 'Made with Emergent' badge removal. All user requirements successfully verified across landing, login, and register pages.

accessibility_warnings.issue: DialogContent requires DialogTitle for screen reader accessibility
accessibility_warnings.impact: Radix UI accessibility warning - does not affect functionality
accessibility_warnings.recommendation: Wrap SheetTitle with VisuallyHidden component or ensure DialogTitle is present

passed_tests: Landing page (/) loads without critical errors
Public topbar does NOT contain 'Start free trial' button (data-testid=public-topbar-primary-cta-button removed)
Public topbar contains 'Log in' button (data-testid=public-topbar-login-link present)
'Made with Emergent' badge is NOT visible on landing page (element removed from DOM)
'Made with Emergent' badge is NOT visible on /login page
'Made with Emergent' badge is NOT visible on /register page
Hero section CTA 'Start 7-day free trial' still present (regression test)
Pricing section with 3 plans still present (regression test)
Mobile menu opens and contains ONLY 'Log in' button (no trial button)
Language switcher functional in topbar and mobile menu
